response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with 10+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker, with current role at re:cinq explicitly involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — a rare and highly relevant match for the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), architecture experience across web/mobile/embedded, and a track record of shipping production systems at scale. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and Kotlin is absent (though Java is listed).
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker matching primary stack
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — directly matches AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops indicating communication skills
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest not listed (Jest/Selenium/custom test runners shown instead), though framework transfer is trivial
Kotlin not present; Java experience is older (robotic arms era at Altom)

key_factors.factor: TypeScript + Node.js + React + MongoDB stack match
